_comment: Model configuration for OptiFlow AI. Change model names or endpoints here — no code changes needed.

intent_parser._comment: Local model for fast intent classification. Falls back to Anthropic on timeout or failure.

fallback._comment: Used automatically when the local model fails or times out.

agent_mode._comment: Used to generate SQL queries and chains in Agent Mode.

response_interpreter._comment: Used to interpret and summarise SQL results in natural language.
